raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is unobstructed on its lateral faces, and there is at least 15 cm of free space on both sides so the robot can bring each arm in from the left and right without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors press against the opposite side walls of box_1, applying balanced inward force and lifting it a few centimetres so it is no longer in contact with box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1 (held, 10 cm above table centre)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already grasped and clear of box_2; the arms have room to maintain their lateral contacts while the robot’s torso remains stationary.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held in mid-air above the tabletop, fully detached from box_2 and ready for further instructions or relocation."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is unobstructed on its lateral faces, and there is at least 15 cm of free space on both sides so the robot can bring each arm in from the left and right without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors press against the opposite side walls of box_1, applying balanced inward force and lifting it a few centimetres so it is no longer in contact with box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already grasped and clear of box_2; the arms have room to maintain their lateral contacts while the robot’s torso remains stationary.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held in mid-air above the tabletop, fully detached from box_2 and ready for further instructions or relocation.
